movie.title: Pennum Porattum (2026) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Malayalam] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: In Pattada, a village defined by its association with death, the narrative centers on Gopalan Master, Charulatha, and Suttu, each facing the village’s harsh judgment and violence. Through their struggles, the story highlights the plight of the marginalized. Suttu finds solace in freedom, choosing to leave. However, Charulatha remains, her future precarious, trapped within Pattada’s cycle of violence and injustice.
